title: Cookies + Conversation
excerpt: A couple Mondays ago I was invited to a fun little girls night at Milk Jar Cookies . While I love their sweet treats, I've never actually been in their shop before this evening. We usually just get their delicious,…
body:
A couple Mondays ago I was invited to a fun little girls night at Milk Jar Cookies. While I love their sweet treats, I've never actually been in their shop before this evening. We usually just get their delicious, amazing cookies delivered, which is what we did for Jack's 2nd birthday party. It's not that far away, but anyone in LA knows that 7 miles can take 70 minutes at the wrong time, no joke. Luckily things worked in my favor and I got there right on time. I hadn't met any of the people invited in person before, but instantly made friends with some awesome women. 

Getting together with like-minded ladies and bonding over writing cards to someone we admire and love who's made a difference in our lives were highlights of the evening. And the cookies!! They were delicious and I may have eaten a few too many! What a sweet night! Have you tried Milk Jar Cookies? They even deliver/ship to anywhere in the US!

All photos by Two Lee Photography
